title: Vaultless Economy
description: A lightweight, modern Minecraft economy plugin with offline support, leaderboards, and full Geyser compatibility.
body:
# 💰 Vaultless Economy

Vaultless Economy is a modern, lightweight economy plugin designed for **Minecraft 1.21+ servers**.

It provides a simple yet powerful economy system **without relying on Vault or outdated APIs**.  
All balances are stored persistently and support **both online and offline players**.

---

## ✨ Features

- 💾 **Offline player economy** (UUID-based)
- 🏆 **Leaderboards** for the richest players
- 🌐 **Fully Geyser-safe** (Bedrock compatible)
- 📁 **YAML-based storage**
- 🛠 **Admin economy commands**
- 🎨 **Customizable messages and prefixes**
- ⚡ **Lightweight & easy to configure**
- 🔒 **Advanced anti-exploit security system**
- 💰 **Built-in tax system**
- 📈 **Passive interest system**
- 📝 **Transaction history & logging**
- 🚨 **Fraud detection & account locking**

---

## ⌨️ Commands

### Player Commands
- `/balance` (`/bal`)
- `/pay <player> <amount>`
- `/pay confirm`
- `/pay cancel`
- `/transactions [count]`

### Admin Commands
- `/eco set <player> <amount>`
- `/eco add <player> <amount>`
- `/eco remove <player> <amount>`
- `/eco giveall <amount>`
- `/eco setall <amount>`
- `/eco unlock <player>`
- `/eco purge [confirm]`
- `/eco taxinfo`

---

## 🔐 Permissions

| Permission | Description |
|---|---|
| `vaultlesseconomy.admin` | Access to all admin commands |
| `vaultlesseconomy.transactions` | View personal transaction history |
| `vaultlesseconomy.transactions.others` | View other players' transaction history |
| `vaultlesseconomy.eco.giveall` | Use `/eco giveall` |
| `vaultlesseconomy.eco.setall` | Use `/eco setall` |
| `vaultlesseconomy.eco.unlock` | Unlock player accounts |
| `vaultlesseconomy.eco.purge` | Purge inactive accounts |
| `vaultlesseconomy.tax.exempt` | Exempt from taxes |

---

## 🧩 Supported Platforms

- **Paper**
- **Spigot**
- **Purpur**
- **GeyserMC** (Bedrock)

---

## ☕ Requirements

- **Minecraft:** 1.21+ or latest 26.1+
- **Java:** 21+ (including Java 26 support)
- [ServiceIO](https://hangar.papermc.io/TheNextLvl/ServiceIO/versions)

---

## ⚙️ Highlights

- Atomic transaction handling
- Configurable taxes and interest
- Secure payment validation
- Configurable decimal precision
- Thousands separator formatting
- Fully configurable messages
- Fast transaction history lookup
- Modern config structure
- Optimized for performance and stability
